member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.IScoreboardFactory
member.summary: Interface to abstract the building of a packet handler based on a given configurationName.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.IScoreboardFactory.CreateLogger(System.Int32,System.String,System.UInt64,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns an interface to a Scoreboard Logger which can process Scoreboard data.
member.param: The base number under which to store Scoreboard counters.

A string of comma-separated integers which map characters in the pattern name to produce a scoreboard counter. Positive indexes starting at 0 map to characters at the start of the string to map and forward. Negative indexes starting at -1 map to characters at the end of the string to map and backwards.

The max number of fails that can be processed. If the maximum number of failures is reached then a single additional counter will be logged. This maxfails counter will consist of the base number plus a string made up with instances of the character '9' only. The number of 9s used will be equal to the number of indexes on the PatternNameMap. For example, with Base Number "1234" and a PatternNameMap containing 5 indexes, the maxfails counter to be logged is "123499999".
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.IScoreboardFactory.CreateResults(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns an object of the IScoreboardResults to retrieve the scoreboard results of the current DUT.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.FactoryBuilder
member.summary: Builds a default IInputDataFactory.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.FactoryBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds a default IInputDataFactory.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.IScoreboardLogger
member.summary: Scoreboard Logger interface.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.IScoreboardLogger.ProcessFailData(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Clear existing data and processes scoreboard data.
member.param: The failure pattern names to process.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.IScoreboardLogger.ProcessFailData(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}}})
member.summary: Clear existing data and processes scoreboard data.
member.param: The failure execution info (occurences/burstIDs...).

members.member:
Print scoreboard counters to ituff.
Test instance name postfix.>

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.IScoreboardResults
member.summary: Scoreboard Service interface.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.IScoreboardResults.GetAllCounters
member.summary: Returns all the counters that have been processed by all loggers.
member.returns: A list with all the counters from all Loggers.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardDataManager
member.summary: This class manages the scoreboard data in the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardDataManager.#ctor(Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Shared Storage service.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardDataManager.WriteScoreboardCounters(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Stores scoreboard counters into the shared storage.
member.param: The base number for the counters to be stored.
A hashset containing the scoreboard counters to store. The counters must be prefixed with the base number.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardDataManager.ReadScoreboardCounters(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the current scoreboard counters for the given base number.
member.param: The base number of the counters to be read.
member.returns: A hashset with the counters prefixed with the base number.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardDataManager.GetBaseNumberList
member.summary: Returns a the base numbers that have been stored in the shared storage.
member.returns: A hashset containing the base numbers that have been saved in the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardDataManager.AddBaseNumberToList(System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates the Shared Storage list of base numbers with the current base number.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardFactory
member.summary: Builds a default ScoreboardLogger object.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardLogger
member.summary: Implementation of the Scoreboard Logger interface.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardLogger.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardLogger.LoggerParams,Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardDataManager,Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Struct with users parameters required.
The scoreboard data manager which accesses the shared storage.
Datalog service.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardLogger.GetMappedString(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a string containing the characters that are mapped by the provided index map.
member.param: The string from which to map the indexed characters.

A string with comma-separated integer indexes. Each index represents the position of a corresponding character in the string to map. Positive indexes starting at 0 map to characters at the start of the string to map and forward. Negative indexes starting at -1 map to characters at the end of the string to map and backwards.
member.returns: The string of characters that were mapped with the index map.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardLogger.LoggerParams
member.summary: Simple struct with user params.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardLogger.LoggerParams.BaseNumber
member.summary: The base number under which to store Scoreboard counters.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardLogger.LoggerParams.PatternNameMap
member.summary: A string of comma-separated integers which map characters in the pattern name to produce a scoreboard counter. Positive indexes starting at 0 map to characters at the start of the string to map and forward. Negative indexes starting at -1 map to characters at the end of the string to map and backwards.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardLogger.LoggerParams.MaxFails
member.summary: The max number of fails that can be processed. If a negative number is passed the maximum possible value will be used.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardLogger.LoggerParams.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The base number under which to store Scoreboard counters.

A string of comma-separated integers which map characters in the pattern name to produce a scoreboard counter. Positive indexes starting at 0 map to characters at the start of the string to map and forward. Negative indexes starting at -1 map to characters at the end of the string to map and backwards.
The max number of fails that can be processed. If a negative number is passed the maximum possible value will be used.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardResults
member.summary: ScoreBoard Service main class.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.ScoreboardResults.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
